name: Subway Batman Runner
description: subway Batman Runner for FREE and play the most addictive mobile game ever created! Your objective is to guide Batman along the road and let him jump over the obstacles to avoid hitting them and also avoid being arrested by enemies to score the highest possible score. This is an endless running and jumping game which means you can play as long as you don’t die.
instructions: Use Mouse Or keyboard To Play
tags: Batman, Boys, Game, Girls, run, running, Shoot, subway, Subway Surfers
